trigger: Every user-requested pre-match football analysis when a complete current market can be lawfully and normally accessed.
fail_closed_rules: If the current market is incomplete, unsynchronized, stale or lacks a defensible source observation time, do not persist it as valid PIT evidence.
If only AH/OU is available without complete 1X2, it may be used as current crosscheck but cannot pass the complete V5.2.3 snapshot contract.
If OU line is not exactly 2.5, do not run the frozen GER/FRA V5.3.1 matrix profile.
Shadow outputs never replace formal CURRENT direction, score matrix or EV until a later formal promotion receipt passes CURRENT hard gates.
Historical 2025/26 Football-Data closing averages remain retrospective reference and must never be copied into the prospective evidence directory.
